description_long: This is a modern, single-story house with a large, sloped terracotta roof and a rectangular footprint. The front features a covered carport with space for two vehicles, a paved driveway, and a landscaped entry path with small shrubs. The rear of the house includes a wooden deck area with a swimming pool and palm trees, providing a private outdoor space. Large glass windows and sliding doors are visible on the sides, allowing for ample natural light and easy access to the exterior. The exterior walls are finished in a combination of dark and light materials, giving the house a contemporary appearance. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and integration with outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, single-story house with a large sloped terracotta roof, carport, swimming pool, and landscaped entry. Features large windows, a wooden deck, and a contemporary exterior.
description_view_0: Side view showing the solid dark wall, a large window, and a glimpse of the landscaped entry and palm tree.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the carport with two cars, main entry path, landscaped garden, and the pool area to the right.
description_view_2: Rear/side view showing the wooden deck, swimming pool, large sliding glass doors, and additional landscaping.
description_view_3: Back view dominated by the expansive terracotta roof and minimal visible features except for landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered carport, paved path, small steps, and minimalistic landscaping with shrubs and palm trees.
